transactions.desc: The Cubs recalled Dean from Triple-A Iowa on Friday, Jared Wyllys of AllCHGO.com reports.
The Pittsburgh Pirates traded C Joey Bart to the Atlanta Braves.
The Atlanta Braves traded RHP Hunter Stratton to the Pittsburgh Pirates.
Atlanta designated Leon for assignment on Thursday.
The Pirates acquired Stratton from Atlanta on Thursday in exchange for Joey Bart.
Ballesteros was optioned to Triple-A Iowa on Thursday, Elias Schuster of SI.com reports.
Pomeranz was released by the Angels on Thursday.
Johnson was called up from Double-A Rocket City, and he will start Thursday's contest on the mound against the Athletics, Rhett Bollinger of MLB.com reports.
The Angels recalled Moore from Triple-A Salt Lake on Thursday, Sam Blum of The Athletic reports.
The Phillies selected Wilson's contract from Triple-A Lehigh Valley on Thursday.
The Phillies recalled Johnson from Triple-A Lehigh Valley on Thursday.
The Phillies optioned Banks to Triple-A Lehigh Valley on Thursday.
The Cardinals selected Rajcic's contract from Triple-A Memphis on Thursday.
The Cardinals designated Roycroft for assignment Thursday.
The White Sox recalled Perez from Triple-A Charlotte on Thursday.
The Reds selected Banfield's contract Thursday and optioned him to Triple-A Louisville.
Higgins cleared waivers Thursday and was sent outright to Triple-A Louisville.
The Mets optioned Pintaro to Triple-A Syracuse on Tuesday.
The Giants optioned Whisenhunt to Triple-A Sacramento on Thursday.
The Angels optioned Kerry to Triple-A Salt Lake on Thursday.
The Angels optioned Porter to Triple-A Salt Lake on Thursday.
Atlanta optioned Camargo to Triple-A Gwinnett on Thursday.
The Cardinals optioned Roycroft to Triple-A Memphis on Thursday.
The Toronto Blue Jays traded C Tyler Heineman to the Los Angeles Angels.
The Seattle Mariners traded RHP Randy Dobnak to the Kansas City Royals.
The Toronto Blue Jays traded C Alejandro Kirk to the Los Angeles Angels.
The Phillies optioned Painter to Triple-A Lehigh Valley following his start against the Marlins on Wednesday.
Atlanta designated Stratton for assignment Wednesday.
The Athletics reinstated Civale (shoulder) from the injured list ahead of his start Wednesday against the Pirates.
The Athletics optioned Morales to Triple-A Las Vegas on Wednesday.
